NAVAREA XIX 23/21

1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 140630 UTC MAR 21
NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
72-26.4N 020-08.2E TRANSOCEAN ENABLER
71-18.3N 022-18.5E SCARABEO 8
65-50.5N 007-41.4E DEEPSEA NORDKAPP
NOTES: A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N. REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 21/21
